name: Gourmet Goulash
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
3 cups No Yolks® egg noodle substitute, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine tomato sauce, worcestershire sauce, garlic, sugar, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
2. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium flame.
3. Add chicken, onions, and bell peppers to the skillet. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and the vegetables are tender.
4. Add the tomato sauce mixture to the skillet.
5. Cover and cook for 20 minutes.
6. Cook the egg noodle substitute according to package directions.
7. Add the cooked egg noodle substitute to the chicken mixture.
